❯ research how websockets work in Deno

● I'll research this for you.

● Agent(Explore)
  ⎿  WebSocket in Deno uses the standard WebSocket API. The server side uses
     Deno.serve() with upgrade. Found examples in src/ws.ts and docs/api.md.

● Based on the research:

  Deno has native WebSocket support on both client and server:

  **Client:** Standard `new WebSocket(url)` API, same as browsers.

  **Server:** Use `Deno.serve()` and check for the `upgrade: websocket` header, then call `Deno.upgradeWebSocket(request)`.

  Your codebase already has an example in `src/ws.ts`.

✻ Brewed for 25s

❯
